category_sources: source_facts.description says minimalistic disassembler library for x86; official project materials describe Udis86 as an x86/x86-64 disassembler library.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge and GitHub materials use Udis86/udis86; source_facts.name is udis86.
docs_sources: Official README says libudis86 API documentation is available online at udis86.sourceforge.net; GitHub README is official repository documentation.
repo_sources: The maintainer-owned GitHub repository vmt/udis86 identifies itself as Udis86 and points to the official udis86.sourceforge.net homepage.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable udcli identify an x86 disassembler library and command-line tool.
